name: OverlayForm
gotchas:
A missing Model no longer fails silently: the EditContext is still
    deferred (EditForm crashes on a null Model + null EditContext), but instead of
    an invisible empty shell the component now renders a dev-visible diagnostic
    so the misconfiguration is obvious during development.

api.name: OverlayForm

parameters.description: The object the form edits. Required — the EditContext is deferred until this is supplied, and a diagnostic renders instead of crashing when it's missing.

parameters.description: Invoked when the form is submitted and passes validation.

parameters.name: OnInvalidSubmit
parameters.description: Invoked when the form is submitted and fails validation.

parameters.description: Content pinned above the scrollable body (e.g. a title or intro text).

parameters.name: Body
parameters.description: The form's fields, rendered inside an independently-scrolling region.

parameters.name: Footer
parameters.description: Content pinned below the scrollable body, above a top border (typically Cancel/Save buttons).

parameters.name: Validator
parameters.description: Override the default DataAnnotationsValidator with a custom validator (e.g. FluentValidationValidator).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root EditForm element (composed with, not overwritten by, the baked-in flex/scroll structure).

parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root EditForm element.

gotchas:
A missing Model no longer fails silently: the EditContext is still
    deferred (EditForm crashes on a null Model + null EditContext), but instead of
    an invisible empty shell the component now renders a dev-visible diagnostic
    so the misconfiguration is obvious during development.

examples.title: Basic Overlay Form
examples.code:
<OverlayForm Model="@_model" OnValidSubmit="HandleSave">
    <Header>
        <Heading Level="3" Class="text-base font-semibold">Edit contact</Heading>
    </Header>
    <Body>
        <Stack Gap="4">
            <Label>Name</Label>
            <Input @bind-Value="_model.Name" Placeholder="Jane Doe" />
            <Label>Email</Label>
            <Input @bind-Value="_model.Email" Placeholder="jane@example.com" />
            <Label>Notes</Label>
            <Textarea @bind-Value="_model.Notes" />
        </Stack>
    </Body>
    <Footer>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Cancel</Button>
        <Button Type="Button.ButtonType.Submit">Save</Button>
    </Footer>
</OverlayForm>

@code {
    private ContactModel _model = new();
    private void HandleSave(EditContext ctx) { /* persist _model */ }
}

examples.title: Prefilled edit + async save
examples.code:
<OverlayForm Model="@_editModel" OnValidSubmit="HandleAsyncSave">
    <Body>
        <Label>Name</Label>
        <Input @bind-Value="_editModel.Name" />
        <Label>Email</Label>
        <Input @bind-Value="_editModel.Email" />
    </Body>
    <Footer>
        <Button Type="Button.ButtonType.Submit" IsLoading="_saving">@(_saving ? "Saving…" : "Save")</Button>
    </Footer>
</OverlayForm>

@code {
    // Prefill from an existing record:
    private ContactModel _editModel = new() { Name = "Ada Lovelace", Email = "ada@example.com" };
    private bool _saving;
    private async Task HandleAsyncSave(EditContext ctx)
    {
        _saving = true;
        await SaveAsync(_editModel);   // await your service
        _saving = false;
    }
}

slots.description: Content pinned above the scrollable body (e.g. a title or intro text).

slots.name: Body
slots.description: The form's fields, rendered inside an independently-scrolling region.

slots.name: Footer
slots.description: Content pinned below the scrollable body, above a top border (typically Cancel/Save buttons).

slots.name: Validator
slots.description: Override the default DataAnnotationsValidator with a custom validator (e.g. FluentValidationValidator).

mdSummary:
# OverlayForm

Overlay Form component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/overlay-form

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| OverlayForm | Model | `object?` | `` | The object the form edits. Required — the EditContext is deferred until this is supplied, and a diagnostic renders instead of crashing when it's missing. |
| OverlayForm | OnValidSubmit | `EventCallback<EditContext>` | `` | Invoked when the form is submitted and passes validation. |
| OverlayForm | OnInvalidSubmit | `EventCallback<EditContext>` | `` | Invoked when the form is submitted and fails validation. |
| OverlayForm | Header | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Content pinned above the scrollable body (e.g. a title or intro text). |
| OverlayForm | Body | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The form's fields, rendered inside an independently-scrolling region. |
| OverlayForm | Footer | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Content pinned below the scrollable body, above a top border (typically Cancel/Save buttons). |
| OverlayForm | Validator | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Override the default DataAnnotationsValidator with a custom validator (e.g. FluentValidationValidator). |
| OverlayForm | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root EditForm element (composed with, not overwritten by, the baked-in flex/scroll structure). |
| OverlayForm | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root EditForm element. |

## Slots
- `Header` (OverlayForm) — Content pinned above the scrollable body (e.g. a title or intro text).
- `Body` (OverlayForm) — The form's fields, rendered inside an independently-scrolling region.
- `Footer` (OverlayForm) — Content pinned below the scrollable body, above a top border (typically Cancel/Save buttons).
- `Validator` (OverlayForm) — Override the default DataAnnotationsValidator with a custom validator (e.g. FluentValidationValidator).

## Events
- `OnValidSubmit` (`EventCallback<EditContext>`) — Invoked when the form is submitted and passes validation.
- `OnInvalidSubmit` (`EventCallback<EditContext>`) — Invoked when the form is submitted and fails validation.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<OverlayForm />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/OverlayForm/OverlayForm.razor`
